title: Persistent Dialogue State (dialog_state.json)
description: Authoritative state for HELEN/MAYOR dyadic dialogue box. Single source of truth for turn counter, oath, verifier flags, and constitutional parameters.

turn.description: Current dialogue turn (0-indexed). Incremented after each HELEN/MAYOR exchange.

oath.description: Constitutional oath: unbreakable commitments (can only be changed via policy mutation protocol)

no_mysticism.description: If true: MAYOR flags any language claiming consciousness/feelings/sentience

append_only.description: If true: MAYOR enforces immutability of dialogue log

determinism.description: If true: MAYOR requires all outputs to be deterministic and reproducible

termination.description: Termination rule: SHIP_OR_ABORT = dialogue must end decisively; OPEN = ongoing

verifier.description: MAYOR verifier configuration (cannot be changed except by oath mutation)

enabled.description: If true: MAYOR actively checks all outputs

check_authority_bleed.description: If true: MAYOR scans all outputs for leaked authority tokens

check_contradiction.description: If true: MAYOR compares current claim against last N turns for logical conflicts

check_coherence.description: If true: MAYOR scores coherence via SCF (if SCF available)

mode.description: Current dialogue mode. dyadic_stable triggers after K consecutive turns of (HELEN proposal → MAYOR block/pass → HELEN adaptation) pattern.

mode_lock_turns.description: Consecutive turns in stable dyadic pattern. Triggers her_al_moment when ≥ K.

her_al_moment_fired.description: Set to true when her_al_moment conditions met (turn counter at moment)

her_al_moment_turn.description: Turn number when her_al_moment fired (null if not yet fired)

identity_hash.description: SHA256(dialog.ndjson full content || kernel version || policy hash). Immutable after first dialogue.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of last state mutation
